title: Sidecar PTS Schema
description: Per-clip sidecar JSON produced by Wave 1 (Track A). Consumed by all downstream tracks. DO NOT modify this schema without coordinating with all tracks.

clip_id.description: Unique clip identifier. Must match the source video filename without extension.

resolution.description: Resolved resolution from FFmpeg metadata. 'unknown' triggers conservative 33ms floor.

fps_nominal.description: Nominal frame rate declared in container metadata.

is_vfr.description: True if variable frame rate detected. If true, consumers MUST use per-frame delta_t_s, not fps_nominal.

slow_motion.description: True if fps_nominal >= 120. Clip is UNSUPPORTED in v1 — consumers must reject it.

readout_time_ms.description: Sensor readout time in milliseconds resolved from LUT. 16 for 1080p, 33 for 4K or unknown.

failure_labels.description: Optional. Failure taxonomy labels for this clip (used in eval harness only).

frames.description: Ordered list of per-frame timestamp entries. One entry per frame.

pts_seconds.description: Exact Presentation Time Stamp in seconds, extracted via FFmpeg.

delta_t_s.description: Exact elapsed time since previous frame in seconds. 0.0 for frame_idx=0. THIS is what the Kalman filter must use as delta_t — never 1/fps_nominal.
